zh.lifeSummary: 當Hellen Kirton於1523年2月23日出生在英國時，她的父親Stephen Kirton25歲，母親Margaret Offley31歲。她於1527年與Richard White在英國英格蘭薩默塞特希利法朗斯結婚。她埋葬在英國哈普爾素斯 瓦恩波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hellen Kirton于1523年2月23日出生在英国时，她的父亲Stephen Kirton25岁，母亲Margaret Offley31岁。她于1527年与Richard White在英国英格兰薩默塞特希利法朗斯结婚。她埋葬在英国哈普爾素斯 瓦恩波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Kirton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Kirton (Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, Suffolk), or Kirton in Lindsey (Lincolnshire). The placenames derive from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ (probably replacing Old English cirice ‘church’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Hellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation, perhaps an altered form of Irish Kelan , or a shortened form of the Scottish surname McKellen (Gaelic Mac Ailein ‘son of Alan’ or Mac Cailein ‘son of Colin’).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Hellen Kirton was born on 23 February 1523, in England, her father, Stephen Kirton, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Offley, was 31. She married Richard White in 1527, in Hillfarrance, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She was buried in South Warnborough, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hellen Kirton est née le 23 février 1523, à Angleterre, son père, Stephen Kirton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Offley, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard White en 1527, à Hillfarrance, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elleenterrée à South Warnborough, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hellen Kirton am 23. Februar 1523 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stephen Kirton 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Offley 31. Sie hat 1527 in Hillfarrance, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Richard White geheiratet. Sie wurde in South Warnborough, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hellen Kirton è nata il il 23 febbraio 1523 nel England, sua padre, Stephen Kirton, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Offley, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Richard White nel 1527, nel Hillfarrance, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Fu sepolta a South Warnborough, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hellen Kirtonが1523年2月23日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Stephen Kirtonは25歳，母Margaret Offleyは31歳であった。1527年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトヒルファランスでRichard Whiteと結婚した。彼女はイギリスハンプシュアイアソウス ワーンボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hellen Kirton(이)가 1523년 2월 23일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen Kirton(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Offley(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 힐파랜스에서 Richard White(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 영국 함프실르 소우스 워버루그h에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hellen Kirton родилась 23 февраля 1523 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Stephen Kirton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Offley, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard White в 1527 г. в местности хиллфарранс, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Она была похоронена в местности соут варнбороую, хампшир, Англия.
